mapper.insert:
insert into base_store_print_template
config_code, config_name, logistics_id, logistics_code, logistics_name, platform_code, platform_name,
belong_owner_id, belong_owner_name, group_id, service_provider_id, service_provider_name, state, remark, created_by, created_name, created_date, modified_by, modified_name, modified_date, version, deleted_flag,
#{configCode}, #{configName}, #{logisticsId}, #{logisticsCode}, #{logisticsName}, #{platformCode}, #{platformName},
#{belongOwnerId}, #{belongOwnerName}, #{groupId}, #{serviceProviderId}, #{serviceProviderName}, #{state}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{createdName}, #{createdDate}, #{modifiedBy}, #{modifiedName}, #{modifiedDate}, #{version}, #{deletedFlag},
mapper.update:
update base_store_print_template
state = #{state}, deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_name = #{modifiedName}, modified_date = #{modifiedDate},
where id in
#{item}
mapper.insert:
insert into base_store_print_template_detail (config_id, logistics_id, logistics_code, logistics_name, platform_code, platform_name, belong_owner_id, belong_owner_name, type, template_id, template_type, template_name, external_template_name, template_url, preview_url, brand_code, template_ext_info, auto_get_flag, service_provider_id, service_provider_name, state, remark, created_by, created_name, created_date, version, deleted_flag) values
( #{item.configId},#{item.logisticsId},#{item.logisticsCode},#{item.logisticsName},#{item.platformCode},#{item.platformName},#{item.belongOwnerId},#{item.belongOwnerName}, #{item.type},#{item.templateId},#{item.templateType},#{item.templateName},#{item.externalTemplateName},#{item.templateUrl},#{item.previewUrl}, #{item.brandCode},#{item.templateExtInfo},#{item.autoGetFlag},#{item.serviceProviderId},#{item.serviceProviderName}, #{item.state},#{item.remark},#{item.createdBy},#{item.createdName},#{item.createdDate},#{item.version},#{item.deletedFlag} )
